prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约1779名→1443名→1109名→952名→995名，整体呈显著上升趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），2021至2024年累计前移 约827名；2025年较2024年小幅后移约43名，基准位次约995名；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年37人、2022年39人、2023年40人、2024年39人、 2025年39人；2026年计划36人，较2025年减少3人，小幅缩招约7.7%，在报考人数不变或增加的情况下竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为2 11工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第39–41名（2026年排名第39名），属于全国顶尖理工类211院校，在电子信息领域享有极高声誉；2025 年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（涉及校园安全事件），2026年声誉数据中未出现该校条目；抖音热度排名第60位（较热），综合热度约53万，短视频平台有一定关注度；未见明显 投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估：信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科，电子信息 与计算机学科群实力位居全国前列，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年社会热度为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，相关专业大类持续升温；青海省2026年高考总考生约48000人（含不确定标记），按近年物理类占比约63.5%估算，物理类考生约30480人，与2025年物理类30457人基本 持平；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省西安市，与青海省同属西北地区，地理位置邻近，对青海考生有天然的地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生计划占比较小（约36人），属跨省招生，本地生源竞争主要受全国报考热度影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体前移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招、青 海省物理类考生数基本持平、电子信息与计算机类专业社会热度持续高企等因素，预计2026年报考竞争较2025年略有加剧，结合专业热度与 学校层次优势进行有限修正，预测2026年理科（物理类）最低位次约979名，位次区间832–1126名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（通信）（陕西西安）
- 计算机类（网络安全）（陕西西安）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）（陕西西安）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（陕西西安）（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）（陕西西安）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）（陕西西安）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间832–1126名内，建议以二档专业（计算机类、电子信息类电子科学方向）为主攻目标，一档专业（通信、网络安全、电子工程）作为冲刺，三档自动化类专业作 为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（832名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（1126名附近）应以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science (Physics Category) were approximately 1779 → 1443 → 1109 → 952 → 995, showing a significant upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition). From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative advancement was about 827 places; in 2025, there was a slight backward shift of about 43 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 995. The university's enrollment plan for Science (Physics Category) in Qinghai Province: 37 students in 2021, 39 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 39 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 36 students, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 7.7%, which slightly intensifies competition if the number of applicants remains unchanged or increases.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 39–41 in recent years (ranked 39th in 2026). It is a top national science and engineering 211 university with a very high reputation in the field of electronic information. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative (involving campus safety incidents); in 2026 reputation data, the university did not appear. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 60th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 530,000, indicating a certain level of attention on short video platforms. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above. The electronic information and computer science discipline cluster ranks among the top in the country, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors is highly recommended, Computer majors are recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, with related major categories continuing to heat up. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination takers in Qinghai Province is about 48,000 (including uncertain markers). Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category students at about 63.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category students is about 30,480, basically unchanged from the 30,457 Physics Category students in 2025. Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, which is in the same northwest region as Qinghai Province, providing natural geographical attraction for Qinghai candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province is relatively small (about 36 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and local student competition is mainly affected by national application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall upward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the basically unchanged number of Physics Category students in Qinghai Province, and the continuously high social popularity of Electronic Information and Computer majors, it is expected that the competition for applications in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. With limited corrections based on major popularity and university level advantages, the predicted minimum ranking for Science (Physics Category) in 2026 is about 979, with a ranking range of 832–1126.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Communications) (Xi'an, Shaanxi)
- Computer Science (Cyberspace Security) (Xi'an, Shaanxi)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering) (Xi'an, Shaanxi)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (Xi'an, Shaanxi) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information) (Xi'an, Shaanxi)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control) (Xi'an, Shaanxi)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 832–1126, it is recommended to target Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information Electronic Science direction) as the main goal, Tier 1 majors (Communications, Cyberspace Security, Electronic Engineering) as a stretch, and Tier 3 Automation majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 832), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1126), prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.
